property.name: containerName
property.value: Wooden Chest

property.name: note
property.value: Wooden Chest. Thief L3+ to steal. Hide (L9+) reduces caught chance. Caught → jail.

property.name: containerName
property.value: Wine Rack

property.name: note
property.value: Wine Rack. Thief L3+ to steal. Hide (L9+) reduces caught chance. Caught → jail.

property.name: note
property.value: Appears only when player is jailed (has cond_jail_sentence). Arranges bail for 250g.

property.name: onEnter_message
property.value: This area is restricted to Astral Beasts only. All non-beast equipment has been moved to your inventory.

property.name: note
property.value: Full-map zone. Strips all non-Astral-Beast equipment to inventory on entry. Prevents equipping anything except Astral Beast items.

property.name: onEnter_message
property.value: Astral Beasts are not permitted in this overworld area. Beast equipment moved to inventory.

property.name: note
property.value: Full-map zone. Opposite of Keys_game. Removes Astral Beast items to inventory on entry.

property.name: onEnter_message
property.value: A powerful dampening spell permeates this area. All guild-crafted magic items have been moved to your inventory and cannot be used here.

property.name: note
property.value: Full-map dampening zone. Strips guild-crafted magic to inventory. Blocks spells, potions, wands, staffs, lockpick, pickpocket, steal, robbery, bash.

property.name: note
property.value: Accepts all 12 crystals to complete Crystal Tower Challenge.

property.name: note
property.value: Quest boss. Defeat to complete haunted location quest.

property.name: note
property.value: Quest boss. Defeat to complete haunted location quest.

property.name: note
property.value: Quest boss. Defeat to complete haunted location quest.

property.name: note
property.value: Quest boss. Defeat to complete haunted location quest.

property.name: note
property.value: Quest boss. Defeat to complete haunted location quest.

property.name: note
property.value: Quest boss. Defeat to complete haunted location quest.

property.name: note
property.value: Search area 1 — drops Moonbloom Petal (witch ingredient)

property.name: note
property.value: Search area 2 — drops Swamp Crystal Shard (witch ingredient)

property.name: note
property.value: Drow cave search area 1 — drops void_salt

property.name: note
property.value: Drow cave search area 2 — drops obsidian_shard

property.name: note
property.value: Drow cave search area 3 — drops moonstone_dust

property.name: note
property.value: Drow cave search area 4 — drops shadow_thread

property.name: note
property.value: Drow cave search area 5 — drops abyssal_water

property.name: note
property.value: Drow cave search area 6 — drops lloth_silk

property.name: note
property.value: Search this area to find Sunny's Tent Ring.

property.name: text
property.value: Village ↑ North

property.name: text
property.value: Rocket Pad ↓ South

property.name: text
property.value: Forest → East

property.name: text
property.value: ← Lake West

property.name: note
property.value: Full-map spawn of Thorned Wolf. Forest mutant.

property.name: note
property.value: Full-map spawn of Venomous Stag. Forest mutant.

property.name: note
property.value: Full-map spawn of Spore Bear. Forest mutant.

property.name: note
property.value: Full-map spawn of Crystal Boar. Forest mutant.

property.name: note
property.value: Full-map spawn of Shadow Deer. Forest mutant.

property.name: note
property.value: Full-map spawn of Ember Fox. Forest mutant.

property.name: note
property.value: Full-map spawn of Frost Elk. Forest mutant.

property.name: note
property.value: Full-map spawn of Acid Hare. Forest mutant.

property.name: note
property.value: Full-map spawn of Storm Crow. Forest mutant.

property.name: note
property.value: Full-map spawn of Stone Lynx. Forest mutant.

property.name: note
property.value: Full-map spawn of Void Rabbit. Forest mutant.

property.name: note
property.value: Full-map spawn of Plague Badger. Forest mutant.

property.name: note
property.value: Blocks tent exit. Only players wearing Sunny's Ring may pass.

property.name: note
property.value: Appears after all 8 drow village quests. Speaks final dialogue then disappears with family.

property.name: note
property.value: Tent exit A — links to exit B. Only ring-wearers pass.

property.name: note
property.value: Tent exit B — links to exit A.

property.name: note
property.value: Rocket to Red Moon — departs from here

property.name: note
property.value: Rocket from Red Moon — returns to main world

property.name: note
property.value: Rocket to Orange Moon — departs from here

property.name: note
property.value: Rocket from Orange Moon — returns to main world

property.name: note
property.value: Rocket to Yellow Moon — departs from here

property.name: note
property.value: Rocket from Yellow Moon — returns to main world

property.name: note
property.value: Rocket to Green Moon — departs from here

property.name: note
property.value: Rocket from Green Moon — returns to main world

property.name: note
property.value: Rocket to Blue Moon — departs from here

property.name: note
property.value: Rocket from Blue Moon — returns to main world

property.name: note
property.value: Rocket to Violet Moon — departs from here

property.name: note
property.value: Rocket from Violet Moon — returns to main world

property.name: note
property.value: Rocket to Silver Moon — departs from here

property.name: note
property.value: Rocket from Silver Moon — returns to main world

property.name: note
property.value: Plague Rat — inflicts ailment conditions in combat

property.name: note
property.value: Venomous Serpent — inflicts ailment conditions in combat

property.name: note
property.value: Shock Scorpion — inflicts ailment conditions in combat

property.name: note
property.value: Frost Wight — inflicts ailment conditions in combat

property.name: note
property.value: Shadow Banshee — inflicts ailment conditions in combat

property.name: note
property.value: Infernal Imp — inflicts ailment conditions in combat

property.name: note
property.value: Bulletin board. Starts: Crystal Tower Challenge, 6 Haunted Place quests, Swamp Witch quest, Drow Cave quest.
